Jackass 3D (2010)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $117,229,692Details
International Box Office $54,241,829
Worldwide Box Office $171,471,521
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $17,704,195
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $4,604,333
Total $22,308,528
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Johnny Knoxville, Bam Margera, Steve-O, Wee Man and the rest of their fearless and foolhardy friends take part in another round of outrageous pranks and stunts. In addition to standing in the path of a charging bull, launching themselves into the air and crashing through various objects, the guys perform in segments such as “Sweatsuit Cocktail,” “Beehive Tetherball” and “Lamborghini Tooth Pull.”

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$50,353,641 (43.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.33 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:68.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$20,000,000 (worldwide box office is 8.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,081 opening theaters/3,139 max. theaters, 4.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $177,700,866

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 15th, 2010 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: November 4th, 2010 (Wide) (Australia)
February 1st, 2024 (Limited) (Australia)
Video Release: March 8th, 2011 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: R for male nudity, extremely crude and dangerous stunts throughout, and for language.
(Rating bulletin 2140, 9/29/2010)
Running Time: 93 minutes
Franchise: Jackass
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Shot in 3-D
Plot point: Miscellaneous Sports, Reality TV, Stuntman
Subgenre: Farcical / Slapstick Comedy
Source:Based on TV
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Factual
Production/Financing Companies: MTV Films, Dickhouse
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Johnny Knoxville, Bam Margera, Steve-O, Wee Man and the rest of their fearless and foolhardy friends take part in another round of outrageous pranks and stunts. In addition to standing in the path of a charging bull, launching themselves into the air and crashing through various objects, the guys perform in segments such as “Sweatsuit Cocktail,” “Beehive Tetherball” and “Lamborghini Tooth Pull.”

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$50,353,641 (43.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.33 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:68.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$20,000,000 (worldwide box office is 8.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,081 opening theaters/3,139 max. theaters, 4.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $177,700,866

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 15th, 2010 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: November 4th, 2010 (Wide) (Australia)
February 1st, 2024 (Limited) (Australia)
Video Release: March 8th, 2011 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: R for male nudity, extremely crude and dangerous stunts throughout, and for language.
